Money Sites Risk Monitoring

High-level overview of money-sites availability, affiliate link integrity, SEO compliance, and visual stability.

Generated: 20260405_190116

5

Total Sites

1

Healthy

1

Degraded

3

Unhealthy
Test Coverage

Each site is evaluated for revenue risk (affiliate links), SEO health, and content integrity. These checks are designed to flag money-page regressions before they impact stakeholders.

HTTP Status

Confirms page availability and successful responses.

  • HTTP 200 expected for money pages
  • Flags timeouts and non-OK statuses

Load Time

Measures page load duration to detect slowdowns.

  • Navigation timing captured
  • Highlights regression risk

SEO Canonical + Indexing

Detects canonical mismatches and indexing risks.

  • Title present
  • Canonical same domain
  • Noindex not present

Toplist Presence

Validates the toplist block and brand cards.

  • Toplist container found + brand count
  • Logo linked to affiliate URL
  • Brand name (review/affiliate/text)
  • Optional bonus text
  • CTA button linked to affiliate URL

Brand Visuals

Flags broken visuals that reduce conversion trust.

  • Brand logo images load successfully
  • Banner image load successfully
  • Broken assets are counted

Affiliate Link Integrity Non-click

DOM-only checks to avoid paid clicks or operator stat pollution.

  • Validates outbound affiliate links and CTA coverage
  • Valid URL format/domain + tracking params
  • No empty or broken href
  • Brand mapping matches
  • target="_blank" + rel includes nofollow
Website Monitoring Overview

Rows are ordered by severity (Unhealthy → Degraded → Healthy). Reasons highlight what triggered each status.

Assets		 Page Load Status Reasons

Per-Website Analysis & Recommendations

Priority order: Unhealthy → Degraded → Healthy. Each card lists causes, impacted links, and fixes.

www.onlinecasinoratgeber.at
UNHEALTHY
HTTP
200
Affiliate links
50
Brands
10
Broken assets
0
Why it is unhealthy
Homepage
  • No issues detected
Review page
  • Affiliate link issue
  • Affiliate target/rel issue
Impacted links (samples)
Homepage affiliate links
No link issues sampled.
Homepage review links
No link issues sampled.
https://www.onlinecasinoratgeber.at/bigclash-casino.html
Affiliate links
  • https://go/bigclash-casino.htmlInvalid domain (bigclash-casino)
  • https://go/bigclash-casino.htmlInvalid format (bigclash-casino)
  • https://go/bigclash-casino.htmlTarget not _blank (bigclash-casino)
Review links
No link issues sampled.
How to fix
  • Fix malformed affiliate URLs and empty targets; validate domain and brand mapping.
  • Ensure affiliate links use valid formatting, target=_blank, and rel includes nofollow.
www.glmshows.com
UNHEALTHY
HTTP
200
Affiliate links
96
Brands
35
Broken assets
0
Why it is unhealthy
Homepage
  • Affiliate target/rel issue
  • canonical domain 'casino-bonus.glmshows.com' differs from base 'glmshows.com'
Review page
  • Affiliate link issue
  • Affiliate target/rel issue
Impacted links (samples)
Homepage affiliate links
  • https://www.glmshows.com/go/paripesa-casino.htmlTarget not _blank
  • https://www.glmshows.com/go/spinbet-casino.htmlTarget not _blank
  • https://www.glmshows.com/go/playmojo-casino.htmlTarget not _blank
  • https://www.glmshows.com/go/Rainbow-Spins-Casino.htmlTarget not _blank
Homepage review links
No link issues sampled.
https://www.glmshows.com/casino/christchurch-casino/
Affiliate links
  • https://www.glmshows.com//go/christchurch-casino.htmlInvalid format (christchurch-casino)
  • https://www.glmshows.com//go/christchurch-casino.htmlTarget not _blank (christchurch-casino)
Review links
No link issues sampled.
How to fix
  • Ensure affiliate links use valid formatting, target=_blank, and rel includes nofollow.
  • Fix SEO meta tags (title, canonical) and remove noindex directives if unintended.
  • Fix malformed affiliate URLs and empty targets; validate domain and brand mapping.

Impacted links (samples)
Homepage affiliate links
No link issues sampled.
Homepage review links

No broken review-page links sampled.
How to fix
  • Restore widget embed or update widget selectors for the new layout.
  • Fix SEO meta tags (title, canonical) and remove noindex directives if unintended.
